no.title: Field
no.subtitle: Field er et hjelpemiddel for å automatisk koble et felt sammen med [label](/no/components/docs/label/overview), beskrivelse, [validation message](/no/components/docs/validation-message/overview) og antall tegn.

en.title: Field
en.subtitle: Field is a helper component to automatically associate a field with [label](/en/components/docs/label/overview), description, [validation message](/en/components/docs/validation-message/overview) and character count.
